title: CoPilot 2.0 MMP
summaryBody: Major Release covering billing enhancements, ability for practices to display typical packages and prices based on company and business type as well as setting bespoke services and prices on an individual basis.
detailBody: Major Release covering billing enhancements, ability for practices to display typical packages and prices based on company and business type as well as setting bespoke services and prices on an individual basis.
